title: Ardisia dryeri
taxonomy: Ardisia dryeri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is a member of the genus Ardisia, which comprises over 600 species of plants. The exact classification of Ardisia dryeri within the genus is still being researched and refined by botanists. Ardisia dryeri is native to the Himalayan region and is often found in subtropical and tropical forests. It is a low-growing, evergreen shrub with small, fragrant white flowers.
